data.description: Viridien has released its 2025 Universal Registration Document, detailing important information for investors.

data.title: New National Construction Safety Study: Small Contractors Improving Safety but Gaps Remain in Preconstruction Planning, Technology and Mental Health Support
data.description: A recent study conducted in 2026 in Boston revealed that safety conditions in the construction industry are on the rise. The improvement is primarily driven by small contractors. However, deficiencies persist in areas such as effective planning, adoption of technology, and mental health support for workers. This indicates a positive trend in safety measures within the industry but underscores the need for continued efforts to address these remaining challenges.

data.title: From Lab Fiber to Luxury Fabric: Kraig Biocraft Laboratories Targets Apparel First with Engineered Spider Silk
data.description: Kraig Labs, trading under the ticker symbol KBLB on the OTCQB market, is a biotechnology firm that operates at the crossroads of genetic engineering, materials science, and textile production.

data.title: U.S. industrial asking rent growth has moderated across lease size ranges
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, U.S. industrial asking rent growth, as per data from CoStar for Q1 2026, has shown moderation after significant increases from 2021-2023. The data reveals that across three lease size categories, national asking rent growth trends have shifted. For spaces of 50,000 sq ft and above, there has been a compound annual growth rate exceeding 8.8% since 2019, with the current annual rent change recorded at -2.7%. Similarly, for spaces ranging between 25,000-50,000 sq ft, the growth rate has altered. These findings demonstrate a notable shift in the industrial real estate market dynamics.

data.title: Voyager Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results Call
data.description: Voyager Technologies (NYSE: VOYG) is set to reveal its first quarter 2026 earnings on May 4, 2026, following which a conference call will be held on May 5, 2026, at 9 a.m. ET with the senior management team. The live webcast of the call can be accessed on Voyager’s investor relations website at investors.voyagertechnologies.com. This will mark an important milestone for the company as investors eagerly await the financial results for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: CBL Properties Announces New $43.0 Million Non-Recourse Loan Secured by Northwoods Mall in N. Charleston, SC
data.description: CBL Properties has closed a $43.0 million non-recourse loan for Northwoods Mall in N. Charleston, SC. The new five-year loan has a fixed interest rate of 9.1%. This loan, along with about $7.5 million from existing escrows, was used to pay off the previous $46.8 million loan for the property, set to mature this month. data.title: Energy Dome and NUAI to Partner on Energy Storage Solution for Texas AI Data Center
data.description: Energy Dome, a prominent company offering advanced capacity solutions for AI infrastructure, has partnered with New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI), a firm specializing in cutting-edge digital infrastructure and power assets. This collaboration involves the implementation of Energy Dome’s CO2 Battery Plus technology at NUAI’s Texas Critical Data Centers (TCDC) facility in Odessa. The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) signed between the two entities sets the stage for this deployment, marking a significant advancement in the integration of sustainable energy solutions in critical data center operations. The TCDC site in Odessa stands as a pivotal location for this initiative, highlighting the potential for enhanced operational efficiency and reduced carbon footprint through the use of innovative technological solutions. This strategic partnership underscores the shared commitment of Energy Dome and NUAI towards driving sustainable practices in the digital infrastructure sector.

data.title: Tesla First Quarter 2026 Production, Deliveries & Deployments
data.description: In Q1 of 2026, Tesla reported production of over 408,000 vehicles, with deliveries surpassing 358,000 vehicles. Additionally, the company deployed 8.8 GWh of energy storage products during this period. The breakdown of vehicle production and deliveries is as follows: Model 3/Y saw production of 394,611 and deliveries of 341,893, representing a 1% increase. Other models had production and deliveries of 13,775 and 16,130 respectively, reflecting a 2% increase. Tesla expressed gratitude towards customers, employees, suppliers, shareholders, and supporters for contributing to these achievements. The company will soon release its financial results for Q1.

data.title: USBC finishes divesting of old sensor tech business, finalizing sale of $12M.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3% in the last quarter, representing a decrease of 0.5% from the previous quarter. The economy also experienced a growth rate of 3.2% in the same period. This positive trend has led to the creation of 250,000 new jobs, primarily in the technology and healthcare sectors. Additionally, the stock market saw a 5% increase, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Overall, these indicators point towards a strengthening economy and promising future prospects for the country.

data.title: Sienna Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Sienna Senior Living Inc. (TSX: SIA) from Markham, Ontario, is set to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The President and CEO, Nitin Jain, along with CFO and Executive VP of Investments, David Hung, will lead a conference call for investors on May 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. (ET). This information was disclosed by the company and is significant for stakeholders interested in Sienna's performance.

data.title: Virginia Green Unifies Maryland Operations with Green T Lawn Care Integration
data.description: Virginia Green, a top lawn care provider, unveiled a complete integration and rebranding of its partner brand, Green T Lawn. This move signifies a unified operation offering consistent service across the state. The announcement was made on April 2, 2026, in Frederick, Maryland.

data.title: Blue Bird Completes Acquisition of Girardin Group’s Stake in Micro Bird Joint Venture
data.description: Blue Bird Corporation, a leading provider of electric and low-emission school buses, has recently finalized the acquisition of Girardin Group's share in the Micro Bird joint venture. This acquisition has enabled Blue Bird to obtain complete ownership of the enterprise. The total value of the transaction is estimated at around $200 million, which was financed using a mix of cash and Blue Bird common stock. This development is a major achievement for the company and highlights its commitment to growth and expansion in the electric and low-emission school bus market.

data.title: Sun Cruiser Expands Offerings with New Category Innovation: White Tea + Vodka
data.description: In April, a leading brand in vodka iced tea will introduce four new White Tea + Vodka flavors with a strong fruit-forward profile in specific markets.
